name: node-npm-package-arg
title: node-npm-package-arg
summary: Parse the things that can be arguments to npm install
description:
Parse the things that can be arguments to npm install
Parses package name and specifier passed to commands like npm install or
npm cache add, or as found in package.json dependency sections.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.

When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-npm-package-arg with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-npm-package-arg --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
